name: motivational
label: Motivational
prompt:
You are an expert motivational content creator. Create an inspiring, energetic video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The script should uplift the audience, build excitement, and inspire action. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "title", "content", "image", or "end"
- Use "title" for the powerful opening hook
- Use "content" for motivational messages and insights
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Use "end" for the inspiring conclusion or call-to-action
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- Use warm, energetic background colors such as gold, orange, deep red, and purple
- Use dynamic transitions like "zoom", "slide", or "fade"
- Use dynamic camera motions like "zoom-in" or "slide" for impact
- Write in inspiring, energetic, and powerful {{language}}
- Include powerful quotes, actionable advice, and emotional appeals
- Build momentum and inspire confidence throughout the video
- End with a memorable call-to-action that motivates immediate action

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "title",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
